title: Birch Creaking
description: Adds the Birch Creaking to birch forest biomes.
body:
## Birch Creaking

![Birch Creaking Modrinth header image.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2524280e1ab95daf3b6d46e37bd7ef5a4e4b7468.png)

Step into the birch or old-growth birch forests, place a creaking heart, and watch as the Birch Creaking comes to life!

This pack uses CEM to turn the Creaking into a Birch Creaking when spawned in a birch forest or old-growth birch forest biome. 

Check out the short featuring this resource pack here: [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/z1p7E_AiCys](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/z1p7E_AiCys)
